---
title: "ledd_calculator_kz"
format: html
editor: visual
---

##### 1. Export the instrument "PD Medications - LED Calculation" from Z1XADRCNACC Database as a CSV file (raw labels)

##### 2. save that CSV to your Desktop (or wherever), then copy + paste the name of the file below

### Imports and path read in

Please edit the paths.yaml file with your desired input and output paths.

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(yaml)

#read in paths from your configuration file
paths <- read_yaml("paths.yaml")
```

```{r}
calculate_levodopa <- function(row){
  row <- 
}
```
